article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborator with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent industry figures and his own sample pack release.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his collaborations with prominent figures in the music industry.
He has worked with artists such as DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer, establishing a notable presence within the electronic music scene.
Noizekid released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums used across various productions.
His work is often associated with a network of similar artists including ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot.
